> 
> >Description:
> 
> 	/usr/share/examples/worm still thinks that we have worm(4).
> 	The burncd.sh script in particular is of historical interest only.
> 

Even though the SCSI worm(4) driver no longer exists, the ATAPI CD driver
still uses the WORM ioctls to burn CDs.

That's why wormcontrol is still in the tree.  That example should probably
be updated for the ATAPI CD driver.

Ken
